dependencies.source: README.md - 编译章节 + CMakeLists.txt + hcom.spec BuildRequires

ut_commands.source: README.md - 编译和执行UT用例章节

sample_commands.value: export HCOM_BUILD_TOOLS_PERF=on && bash build.sh (documented but not functional); actual: bash build/build_tools_perf.sh
sample_commands.source: README.md - 编译和执行HCOM性能测试工具章节 + build/build_tools_perf.sh

execution_log.error: fatal error: infiniband/verbs.h: No such file or directory

execution_log.output: Build succeeded. libhcom.so.0.0.1, libhcom_static.a, dist tarball created

execution_log.error: src/hcom/multicast/utils/multicast_utils.h:15: error: 'uint16_t' has not been declared. Missing #include <cstdint> in multicast source code.
execution_log.resolution: Unresolved - source code bug in multicast module. Test CMakeLists.txt unconditionally globs all source files including multicast.

execution_log.command: cd repo && CFLAGS='-include cstdint' CXXFLAGS='-include cstdint' HCOM_BUILD_TYPE=debug HCOM_BUILD_TESTS=on bash ./build.sh
execution_log.error: C compiler test failed: cstdint is a C++ header, not valid for C compiler
execution_log.resolution: Could not work around without modifying source code

execution_log.output: Binary executes, shows usage/example commands, loads ibverbs, fails gracefully with 'No matched ip found' (expected: no RDMA hardware in WSL)

process_timeline.action: Read README.md, build.sh, CMakeLists.txt, hcom.spec, CONTRIBUTING.md
Try CXXFLAGS workaround for multicast bug
process_timeline.result: failed - C compiler incompatible with cstdint

failures.error: Unit test build failed due to compile error in multicast source code. src/hcom/multicast/utils/multicast_utils.h:15 uses uint16_t without #include <cstdint>. Test CMakeLists.txt unconditionally globs all source files via GLOB_RECURSE, so multicast code is compiled even when BUILD_WITH_MULTICAST=off.

ut.note: 0 tests executed because build did not complete. The gtest/mockcpp test tools were successfully downloaded and installed to dist/hcom_test_tools/.

results.name: hcom_perf
results.execution: Binary runs successfully, displays usage help. Loads ibverbs library, reports version info. Fails gracefully with clear error on missing RDMA hardware (expected in WSL environment).

documentation_gaps: build_example_perf.sh referenced in build.sh (line: [[ "${HCOM_BUILD_EXAMPLE,,}" == "on" ]] && bash build_example_perf.sh) but file does not exist
HCOM_BUILD_TOOLS_PERF env var is defined and echoed in build.sh but never triggers any build action (unused variable)
README.md claims 'export HCOM_BUILD_TOOLS_PERF=on && bash build.sh' builds perf tools, but build.sh does not call build_tools_perf.sh based on this variable
Perf tools require separate invocation: bash ./build/build_tools_perf.sh after main build
Test tools (gtest, mockcpp) are auto-downloaded by install_test_tools.sh but their source URLs are embedded in the script, not documented in README
No explicit dependency list in README.md - dependencies only found in hcom.spec BuildRequires and CMakeLists.txt
multicast module has missing #include <cstdint> in multicast_utils.h (source code defect, not documentation issue)
Test CMakeLists.txt uses GLOB_RECURSE that unconditionally includes all source files, including disabled transport modules (multicast)

problems_encountered.problem: multicast_utils.h: uint16_t not declared - compile error in test build
problems_encountered.solution: Unresolved. Source code defect: multicast_utils.h uses uint16_t without #include <cstdint>. Test CMakeLists.txt unconditionally includes multicast sources via GLOB_RECURSE.

problems_encountered.problem: HCOM_BUILD_TOOLS_PERF env var does not trigger perf build as README documents
problems_encountered.solution: Called build/build_tools_perf.sh directly after main build
